stimulus: Founded in 1975 to promote economic cooperation among West African countries, the Economic Community of West African States originally included six members: Nigeria, Ghana, Senegal, Mali, Côte d’Ivoire, and Togo. By the late 1980s, the organization ______blank its initial membership.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The past perfect verb “had doubled” correctly indicates that the doubling occurred during a specific period (by the late 1980s) before the present moment of writing.

Choice B (present) doesn’t fit a past time frame. Choice C (present perfect) implies relevance to the present rather than completion by a past point. Choice D (future) is inconsistent with the past time frame.
